seoTitle: Nombi vs Noona — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nombi and Noona. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nombi and Noona.
heading: Nombi vs Noona — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nombi, New South Wales and Noona, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nombi has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Noona (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nombi or Noona safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nombi has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Noona scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nombi scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Noona scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nombi or Noona?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nombi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
